title: Vs Im Waiting You
sourceTitle: Vs Midjourney V8 1 Im Waiting You

imagePrompts.prompt:
A medium close-up of a single young woman inside a dimly lit Japanese-style bar, authentic daily life photography, natural candid moment. The frame catches a suspended quiet between conversations — the kind of stillness that only exists late at night in a half-empty bar.
East Asian young woman in her early 20s. Almond-shaped eyes with natural double eyelids, slightly elongated eye corners. Straight refined nose with a delicate bridge. Skin tone fair to light beige (NC10–NC20). Skin subsurface scattering visible under warm directional bar light, specular micro-highlights on cheekbones and nose ridge, fine foundation powder grain perceptible near the jaw.
She wears a dark ribbed slip dress, relaxed but deliberate — the kind of outfit chosen without overthinking. One hand loosely wrapped around a lowball glass with amber liquid, elbow resting lightly on the wooden bar counter. Two or three stray hairs displaced by faint air movement, natural unplanned imperfection, not geometrically symmetrical.
Mixed artificial light sources — a warm amber pendant lamp overhead creates a soft gold pool across her shoulder. A faint neon bar sign casts a thin pink-magenta rim light along her cheekbone and collarbone. Rows of spirit bottles glow amber on backlit shelving behind. The mood is self-possessed and cool, a quiet confidence in the stillness. Subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, photographic noise texture not CG render smoothness. Aspect ratio 2:3. No watermark, no text overlay, not cartoon, not digitally painted, not illustration, not anime.
